YOUR GARAGE ORG TIERS vs MARKET
Key insight: Your Undergrad at $1,097 undercuts the national avg ($1,325) while including haul-away that most organizers charge extra for.
Graduate at $2,197 includes bins, deep clean, AND powerwash — most competitors charge $2,750+ for comparable scope.
Doctorate at $3,797 is well within the $2,750-$5,200 range for full-service garage org with premium storage.

column1: YOUR POSITIONING: You sit between the budget Thumbtack organizers ($500-$2,500) and the premium installed cabinet companies ($5,000-$15,000+).
This is the sweet spot — you provide MORE than a basic organizer (haul-away, bins, deep clean) but cost LESS than full custom cabinet builds.
